caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold lettering sits at a desk in a studio setting. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE," alongside a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black speaker. On the desk sits a black mug with red text that reads "TALK OUT YOUR GAME". As the sequence progresses, the man is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands, adjusting his posture slightly while looking toward someone off-screen. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist. The lighting is bright and consistent, focusing on the man as he engages in a conversation within the recording environment.
